contact.address: 1st Floor, Laxmi Krishna Towers, Opp. Hotel Swagath & Collectors Gate, Balmatta, Mangalore – 575001

doctor.name: Dr. Vishal Amin
doctor.tagline: Expert Aesthetic Dermatologist & Cosmetologist in Mangalore
doctor.bio: Dr. Vishal Amin is a highly experienced Aesthetic Dermatologist based in Balmatta, Mangalore, with over 23 years of overall experience and 17 years as a specialist. He completed his MBBS from the prestigious Kasturba Medical College in 2000 and his MD in Dermatology from Jagadguru Jayadeva Murugarajendra Medical College (JJMMC) in 2003. He practises at Vish Skin Clinic, where he offers a comprehensive range of advanced skin and cosmetic treatments including laser therapies, anti-aging procedures, acne management, and surgical dermatology. Known for his friendly demeanour and thorough explanations, Dr. Amin is trusted by thousands of patients across Mangalore and the surrounding region.

hero.subtitle: Trusted by thousands of patients – experience world-class dermatology and cosmetic care with Dr. Vishal Amin at Vish Skin Clinic, Balmatta.

images.alt: Dr. Vishal Amin – Aesthetic Dermatologist, Mangalore

seo.title: Dr. Vishal Amin – Aesthetic Dermatologist & Cosmetologist in Mangalore | Vish Skin Clinic
seo.description: Book an appointment with Dr. Vishal Amin, a top Aesthetic Dermatologist in Balmatta, Mangalore. 23+ years of experience in laser treatments, botox, acne care, pigmentation, and more at Vish Skin Clinic.

services.title: Laser Hair Removal
services.description: Permanent hair reduction for face and body using advanced Diode and IPL laser systems, tailored for all skin types.

services.title: Botox & Dermal Fillers
services.description: FDA-approved Botox injections and dermal fillers to smooth wrinkles, restore volume, and achieve a youthful appearance.

services.title: Acne & Pimples Treatment
services.description: Comprehensive acne management including anti-acne chemical peels, topical therapies, and laser treatments for clear skin.

services.title: Pigmentation & Sun Spot Treatment
services.description: Targeted laser and chemical peel treatments for hyperpigmentation, sun spots, age spots, and melasma.

services.title: Mole & Sebaceous Cyst Removal
services.description: Safe surgical and laser removal of moles, sebaceous cysts, and other benign skin lesions with minimal scarring.

services.title: Tattoo Removal
services.description: Advanced Q-Switch Nd-YAG laser tattoo removal for effective clearance of all ink colours with minimal discomfort.

services.title: PRP for Hair & Skin
services.description: Platelet Rich Plasma (PRP) therapy to stimulate natural hair regrowth and rejuvenate skin texture and tone.

services.title: Scar Treatment
services.description: Fractional laser, derma-roller resurfacing, and chemical peels to reduce acne scars, surgical scars, and stretch marks.

services.title: Thread Lifts & Mesotherapy
services.description: Non-surgical facial contouring with thread lifts and skin-boosting mesotherapy for a refreshed, lifted look.

services.title: Anti-Aging Treatments
services.description: Holistic anti-aging protocols combining Botox, fillers, thread lifts, and PRP for long-lasting, natural results.

steps.title: Book a Consultation
steps.desc: Call us, WhatsApp, or book online via Practo to schedule your appointment at a time that suits you.

steps.title: Personalised Assessment
steps.desc: Dr. Vishal Amin will conduct a thorough skin evaluation and discuss your concerns and treatment goals.

steps.title: Customised Treatment Plan
steps.desc: Receive a tailored treatment plan using the latest dermatological and aesthetic technologies.

steps.title: Ongoing Care & Follow-up
steps.desc: Enjoy dedicated post-treatment support and follow-up visits to ensure the best possible results.
